case_for: Allen has shown flashes of high-end WR1 upside as recently as December (22.6, 27.6 pts), so a positive game script could push him past 12 points
case_against: The pregame projection of just 4.9 points and a clear downward trend in his last two outings (6.9, 4.9) suggest a diminished role or health/target concern that makes 12+ points unlikely
